title: agrostis altissima
intro: Agrostis altissima, also known as tall bent or tall bent grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Agrostis altissima can be prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
